\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4579 introduces Wavefunction Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} |\psi_0\rangle = \mathcal{U}_{\text{prep}} |vac\rangle \implies \text{Hadamard Initialization} \end{equation}
